homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track combines a strong electronic dance music influence with an upbeat and energetic mood. A prominent synth lead drives the melody over a steady four-on-the-floor drum beat, creating a pulsating rhythm ideal for a nightclub or party setting. The sound is defined by its synthesizer textures and consistent bassline, reinforcing its suitability as a high-energy dance piece.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

CAPTION:
questions.caption: An alternative/indie rock piece features a male vocalist singing melodically while an electric guitar carries the main tune. The track maintains an easygoing atmosphere with a steady rhythm provided by acoustic drums, making it suitable for background music in a rock bar.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track captures a cool and groovy vibe, driven by a simple bassline and a repetitive electric guitar riff. The steady rock beat creates a relaxed atmosphere that feels perfect for a casual jam session or a road trip with friends.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense segment is an instrumental heavy metal track featuring a distorted electric guitar playing power chords alongside a fast-paced drum beat and bass. The aggressive atmosphere creates a driving energy well-suited for video game soundtracks or action movie scenes. Although KNN suggestions hint at darker rock tones, the core sound remains firmly rooted in high-energy metal instrumentation without vocals.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This classical orchestral piece features a slow, flowing rhythm driven by the interplay of violin and cello. A melancholic melody carried by these strings builds a sense of drama and tension within an otherwise somber mood. The composition evokes deep introspection, making it well-suited for a historical drama or a moment of reflection.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental segment presents a slow rock ballad defined by a steady drumming rhythm and a simple, repetitive bass line. A guitar solo plays in a clean tone over this foundation, creating an emotional atmosphere suitable for a live concert setting. The overall sound blends the stability of a structured rhythm with the expressive clarity of electric guitar work.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece serves as a grand and emotional backdrop ideal for a cinematic movie scene, driven by a rich full orchestra and steady rhythm. The composition blends the warmth of strings and piano with ethereal elements from a choir to create a dramatic yet calming soundscape. Ultimately, its sweeping quality offers a sense of introspection perfect for an epic or romantic narrative moment.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
